The '''Bimkall sector''' was a non-existent [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] that, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] mistakenly reported had [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|seceded]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. One [[Standard month/Legends|month]] later, the HoloNet News retracted their story once they realized that the Bimkall sector did not exist.

==History==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] was in full swing, with a variety of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] and corporations declaring their independence from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> In 2:28 of that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] reported that the Bimkall sector was among the sectors that had seceded from the Republic,<ref name="Corrections" /> joining the newly formed [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]];<ref name="CSWE" /> unbeknownst to the news agency at the time, the Bimkall sector was nonexistent. Upon realizing their mistake, the HoloNet News retracted their story one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] later on 3:21, apologizing for the previous error.<ref name="Corrections" />

==Behind the scenes==
The fictitious Bimkall sector was first mentioned in an [[in-universe]] "Corrections" editorial for the HoloNet News, released as part of the [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' 48]] on [[March 21]], [[2002]]. The Bimkall sector later received its own entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published [[December 9]], [[2008]].

The name "Bimkall" was prompted by an incorrect casting rumor for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]—namely that actor [[Wikipedia:Christopher Walken|Christopher Walken]] would be cast as "Darth Kimball."<ref name="Hidalgo">{{Twitter|infinata|status/375447014332301312|[[Pablo Hidalgo]]|nobackup=1}}</ref>
